results.title: Technical advances in motion-robust MR thermometry.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 38501903. 2024/07/01 00:00. this study will help discern the 
selection of motion-robust MR thermometry strategies and inspire the development 
of motion-robust volumetric MR thermometry for practical use in clinics.
